ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the region's data was last updated */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 0-18, 19-65, 66+) */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size of the age group */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender distribution within the age group */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution within the age group */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population in the age group that is vaccinated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the case report */,
  "daily_cases" INTEGER /* Number of daily cases */,
  "weekly_cases" INTEGER /* Number of weekly cases */,
  "cumulative_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of cases */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the cases */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the cases */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the cases */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* List of symptoms reported by the cases */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the cases (e.g., mild, severe, critical) */,
  "source_of_infection" TEXT /* Source of infection (e.g., community, travel, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_capacity" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "bed_capacity" INTEGER /* Total bed capacity of the hospital */,
  "bed_usage" INTEGER /* Current bed usage */,
  "icu_bed_capacity" INTEGER /* Total ICU bed capacity */,
  "icu_bed_usage" INTEGER /* Current ICU bed usage */,
  "ventilator_capacity" INTEGER /* Total ventilator capacity */,
  "ventilator_usage" INTEGER /* Current ventilator usage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the hospital capacity data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_capacity_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric report */,
  "R0_value" REAL /* R0 value of the region */,
  "alpha_value" REAL /* Alpha value of the region */,
  "predicted_daily_cases" INTEGER /* Predicted number of daily cases */,
  "predicted_weekly_cases" INTEGER /* Predicted number of weekly cases */,
  "predicted_cumulative_cases" INTEGER /* Predicted cumulative number of cases */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the predictions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_metrics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., uploaded, processed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view data for the region */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit data for the region */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Whether the user can delete data for the region */,
  "can_analyze" INTEGER /* Whether the user can run advanced analytics for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the case report */,
  "daily_cases" INTEGER /* Number of daily cases */,
  "weekly_cases" INTEGER /* Number of weekly cases */,
  "cumulative_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_cases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_hospital_capacity" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "bed_capacity" INTEGER /* Total bed capacity of the hospital */,
  "bed_usage" INTEGER /* Current bed usage */,
  "icu_bed_capacity" INTEGER /* Total ICU bed capacity */,
  "icu_bed_usage" INTEGER /* Current ICU bed usage */,
  "ventilator_capacity" INTEGER /* Total ventilator capacity */,
  "ventilator_usage" INTEGER /* Current ventilator usage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the hospital capacity data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_hospital_capacity_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_forecasting_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric report */,
  "R0_value" REAL /* R0 value of the region */,
  "alpha_value" REAL /* Alpha value of the region */,
  "predicted_daily_cases" INTEGER /* Predicted number of daily cases */,
  "predicted_weekly_cases" INTEGER /* Predicted number of weekly cases */,
  "predicted_cumulative_cases" INTEGER /* Predicted cumulative number of cases */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the predictions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_forecasting_metrics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., high case number, hospital capacity concern) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., high case number, hospital capacity concern) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_alerts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the dashboard */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was last updated */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the dashboard (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget entry */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dashboard */,
  "widget_name" TEXT /* Name of the widget */,
  "widget_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the widget */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the widget was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the widget was last updated */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the widget (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)
